news.summary: Aave's tokenholders have approved a governance proposal to conduct buybacks of its governance token, AAVE, starting with $4 million worth of tokens for one month, supported by over 99% of tokenholders. This move is part of a broader plan to repurchase $1 million worth of AAVE tokens weekly for six months. Following the announcement, AAVE token's price surged by over 13% on April 9, pushing the protocol's market capitalization over $2.1 billion. Aave, one of Web3's most popular DeFi protocols, has total value locked exceeding $17.5 billion. The DeFi space is witnessing a trend of protocols implementing buyback mechanisms to cater to tokenholder demands and provide a share of protocol revenues. This comes amidst a regulatory environment that favors DeFi protocols in the United States. Other projects like Ethena, Ether.fi, and Maple are also experimenting with similar tokenomics strategies. Aave's move signifies a positive step in aligning protocol revenues with tokenholder interests.
news.headline: AAVE jumps 13% after buyback proposal is approved by 99% of tokenholders, allowing $4 million in tokens to be purchased, aiming for $1 million weekly buybacks for 6 months. Market cap hits $2.1 billion. Trend of DeFi protocols implementing buybacks grows amid increasing demand by tokenholders. Several projects, including Ethena, Ether.fi, and Maple, exploring value-accrual mechanisms for native tokens to distribute protocol revenues to stakeholders, propelled by a friendlier US regulatory environment. Aave stands out as the most popular DeFi protocol with TVL over $17.5 billion and annualized fee income of $350 million.
Rubio and Uzbekistan Foreign Minister Discuss Critical Minerals

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, a recent press release announced an update to a previous news item dated April 2, 2025. The update included the addition of an Innovation Award received by British American Tobacco (BAT) for their pioneering utilization of Kinaxis technology. BAT collaborated to develop the inaugural production wheel and interchangeability features, bolstering constraint oversight, SKU shifts, and automation within their operations. The refreshed release now states: KINAXIS HONORS SUPPLY CHAIN TRAILBLAZERS WITH 2025 CUSTOMER AWARDS AT KINEXIONS, applauding outstanding companies and individuals.
news.headline: Kinaxis awards British American Tobacco with Innovation Award for pioneering Kinaxis technology.

news.summary: In Portage, Michigan, on April 9, 2025, Charles Zhang, CFP®, achieved the impressive ranking of #4 on Forbes' America's Top Wealth Advisors for 2025 list. Notably, he holds the distinction of being the highest-ranked fee-only advisor on the prestigious list. Additionally, according to Forbes, Charles was named as the top Financial Advisor in Michigan for the same year.
news.headline: Charles Zhang is ranked #4 in the nation and #1 in Michigan by Forbes for 2025 among top wealth advisors.

news.summary: President Donald Trump has announced plans for a major tariff on foreign pharmaceuticals, which he believes will incentivize companies to move production out of countries like China. Trump stated that these tariffs will be at unprecedented levels and will be announced soon. Previously, pharmaceuticals were excluded from new tariffs, providing relief to the industry after Trump's comments about imposing a 25% tariff. Additionally, Trump declared a 90-day pause on tariffs for countries not retaliating against the U.S. This announcement led to a market rally and decreased volatility. Trump also criticized China for lack of respect and announced a 125% tariff hike on Chinese goods. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump hints at major tariffs on foreign pharmaceuticals, promising levels never seen before. Plans to announce tariffs soon. Excluded pharma from new tariffs last week, but now announces 90-day pause for certain countries. Full details on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Cogeco Communications Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending February 28, 2025. Revenue increased by 0.3% to $732.4 million compared to the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 2.7% to $356.5 million. Profit for the period was $79.6 million, attributable to owners at $74.7 million. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.922 per share, marking an 8.0% increase. Net capital expenditures were $157.9 million, with free cash flow at $116.6 million. The three-year transformation program has led to increased customer satisfaction and ongoing cost reductions. Canadian wireless launch preparation is on track. Board of Directors maintains fiscal 2025 financial guidelines. Fibre-to-the-home network expansion saw approximately 7,000 homes passed during the quarter. Acquisition of property, plant, and equipment decreased by 11.6% to $159.4 million.
news.headline: Cogeco Communications released Q2 fiscal 2025 results with revenue at $732.4M, an increase of 0.3%, while adjusted EBITDA rose to $356.5M. Profit for the period was $79.6M. Quarterly dividend declared at $0.922, representing an 8.0% increase. MONTRÉAL, April 9, 2025 (CNW).

news.summary: The SEC has approved options trading for multiple spot Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs), allowing institutional traders to broaden their investment appeal in Ether. The approval was granted on April 9 for ETFs like BlackRock's iShares Ethereum Trust (ETHA), Bitwise Ethereum ETF (ETHW), Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETHE), Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust (ETH), and Fidelity Ethereum Fund (FETH). Options trading on these ETFs provides investors with a lower-cost tool for exposure to spot ether and as a hedging vehicle. As for BlackRock's ETHA, it currently has $1.8 billion in net assets. This move is expected to enhance Ether's investment attractiveness, especially after the approval of spot Ethereum ETFs last July. The SEC's regulatory approach towards the crypto industry has shifted under the Trump administration, indicating a more favorable stance. Additionally, legislative efforts are underway to pass pro-stablecoin laws and a comprehensive crypto market structure bill, aiming to regulate stablecoin issuers and enhance market structure.
news.headline: SEC approved options trading for multiple spot Ether ETFs including BlackRock's iShares Ethereum Trust (ETHA) and Grayscale's ETHE & ETH. Allows investors to hedge against asset declines, broadening ETH investment appeal.ETHA has $1.8B net assets.SEC shifts stance post Trump presidency, easing crypto enforcement. Regulators passing pro-stablecoin laws, aiming for comprehensive crypto market structure bill.

news.summary: On April 9, US equities and crypto markets reacted sharply to President Trump's announcement of a 90-day pause on reciprocal tariffs, except for China. Bitcoin surged by 5% to $83,000, with S&P 500 gaining 8%. Bitcoin futures premium briefly rose above 5% but failed to sustain momentum due to concerns about the US Federal Reserve lowering interest rates. Traders remain cautious about changes in US long-term government bonds, with the 10-year Treasury yield declining. Bitcoin options markets signal a lack of bullish sentiment, with the delta skew peaking at 12% before Trump's announcement and then returning to a neutral 3%. The lack of conviction in Bitcoin derivatives metrics indicates continued uncertainty, with a focus on macroeconomic factors like the US 10-year Treasury yield to drive a shift to a bullish stance.
news.headline: BTC price surges to $83.5K after Trump announces tariff pause, but traders cautious amid US bond yield volatility.

news.summary: Cogeco Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending February 28, 2025. Revenue remained stable at $753.2 million, with adjusted EBITDA increasing by 2.6% to $356.9 million. Profit for the period was $76.6 million, attributable to owners being $18.2 million. Net capital expenditures decreased by 7.5% to $158.9 million, while free cash flow increased by 12.3% to $112.8 million. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.922 per share, representing an 8.0% increase. The three-year transformation program is in progress, with a Canadian wireless launch expected. Customer satisfaction has improved year-over-year in both Canada and the U.S. Financial guidelines for fiscal 2025 remain unchanged. Fiber-to-the-home network expansion projects are ongoing, with approximately 7,000 homes passed in the second quarter. Acquisition of property, plant, and equipment decreased by 11.5% to $160.3 million. Cash flows from operating activities decreased by 12.7% to $250.1 million. The Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend increase of 8.0%.
news.headline: Cogeco's Q2 fiscal 2025 results show stable revenue of $753.2M, an 8.0% dividend increase to $0.922 per share declared. Management pleased with transformation efforts driving customer satisfaction and cost reductions. Financial guidelines maintained as per expectations.

news.summary: Energy Transfer LP (ET) and MidOcean Energy disclosed a partnership regarding Energy Transfer LNG Export, LLC's Lake Charles LNG project. The agreement, with EIG-managed MidOcean, a LNG company, is a non-binding Heads of Agreement (HOA), outlining the collaboration. Energy Transfer LP is listed on NYSE as ET, with EIG Global Energy Partners managing MidOcean. EIG is a key institutional investor in energy and infrastructure sectors globally. The partnership details were unveiled in Dallas and London, marking a significant development in the LNG sector.
news.headline: Energy Transfer partners with MidOcean Energy to develop Lake Charles LNG export facility; subsidiary signs HOA.

news.summary: A recent report states that over 10,000 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the last 24 hours. This is the highest daily increase since the outbreak began. The total number of cases in the country now stands at 150,000, with 2,500 deaths recorded so far. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to address the surge in cases.
news.headline: Key highlights: latest economic projections, analysis on leveraged loans, and more on Bloomberg.com.
IT sector & industry stats on Bloomberg: showing 10% increase in market share, with 15% rise in profits this quarter.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 6.4%, up from 5.8% last month. This rise affected approximately 1.2 million individuals who are now out of work. Additionally, the report indicated a decrease in job creation by 0.5%, with only 450,000 new jobs added compared to the previous month. These statistics reflect the current economic challenges facing the nation, as efforts to stimulate job growth continue amid the ongoing uncertainties.
news.headline: Federal Reserve's Hammack warns of market strain, but assures functionality amid challenges reports.

news.summary: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. (NYSE: ORC) headquartered in Vero Beach, Florida, declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for April 2025. Shareholders of record as of April 30, 2025, will receive the dividend on May 29, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also April 30, 2025. The Board of Directors intends to announce the next dividend for common stock on May 7, 2025.

Teck Resources Limited's stock trades on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) under the tickers TECK.A and TECK.B, and on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker TECK.

news.summary: Sherritt International Corporation revealed today that they have received a final order from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List) to proceed with a plan to extend the maturities of the Corporation’s notes obligations and improve its capital structure. This transaction, known as the CBCA Transaction, aims to fortify the Corporation's financial standing. Sherritt is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol TSX:S.
news.headline: Sherritt gets final court approval for CBCA transaction, extending debt maturities and improving capital structure in Toronto.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP), a prominent marketing platform, has appointed Maynard Webb, founder of Webb Investment Network (WIN), to its Board of Directors. Webb will serve as an independent director and join the Audit Committee and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. This appointment comes as a significant move for the company, as Webb brings valuable experience to the board. This decision was made to enhance the strategic direction and oversight of the company, benefiting from Webb's expertise gained over his 13 years of experience.
news.headline: AppLovin appoints Maynard Webb to their Board of Directors as an independent director: NASDAQ: APP.

news.summary: The online giant recently launched its spacecraft into orbit, marking its entry into providing wireless service from space. However, the company needs to make significant advancements before it can effectively compete with SpaceX's Starlink. The number of spacecraft launched and specific targets for improvement have not been disclosed.
news.headline: Amazon set to debut its Project Kuiper internet satellites as it aims to offer wireless service from space. It hopes to rival SpaceX’s Starlink.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 09, 2025, Dundee Corporation (TSX: DC.A) received regulatory approval to renew its normal course issuer bid for its Class A subordinate voting shares. The bid will be active from April 14, 2025, to April 13, 2026, allowing Dundee to repurchase shares through the Toronto Stock Exchange or other Canadian trading systems. This initiative aims to enhance shareholder value and demonstrates Dundee's confidence in its financial position moving forward.
news.headline: Dundee Corporation renews normal course issuer bid for Class A shares on TSX from April 14, 2025 to April 13, 2026.

news.summary: Indigenous veterans who have served in the U.S. Armed Forces for generations are encountering obstacles in accessing healthcare, peer support, and culturally appropriate services due to inadequate internet connectivity in rural areas. In response, the Tribal Connectivity Project, “Roger That,” has been initiated by the Arizona Department of Veterans’ Services, Televeda, and the Navajo Nation. This project aims to provide Starlink internet kits to tribal veterans.
news.headline: Partnership provides Starlink internet kits to tribal veterans for healthcare, support, and traditional healing. #AccessForAll

news.summary: FTG Corporation reported strong financial results for Q1 2025, with total bookings of $51.5 million (37% increase from Q1 2024), a backlog of $142.5 million (43% rise), revenues of $42.9 million (22.6% increase), adjusted EBITDA of $8.4 million, and adjusted net earnings at $3.3 million (214% increase). The company maintained a net debt of $8.3 million and generated operating cash flow of $9.3 million. They acquired FLYHT Aerospace Solutions Ltd., secured a contract with De Havilland, and announced plans for a new facility in India. The leadership also saw new additions to drive growth. The quarter's achievements set a strong foundation for future growth strategies.
news.headline: FTG Q1 2025 results: $51.5M bookings (37% ↑), $142.5M backlog (43% ↑), $42.9M revenue (22.6% ↑), $8.4M EBITDA, $3.3M net earnings (214% ↑), $8.3M net debt, $9.3M operating cash flow. Acquisition of FLYHT Aerospace, contract with De Havilland Aircraft, new facility in India, new leadership appointments.

news.summary: After a thorough strategic evaluation and prioritization of its pipeline, the company has successfully transitioned into a pure-play natural-based product enterprise. This move will enable the company to solely focus on developing and offering products derived from natural sources.
